title.en: Soon, a first-class invincible descended here.

content.en:
"So many fourth-class invincibles!"

Ye Tian glanced around and found that there were tens of thousands of fourth-rank invincibles gathered here, although he didn't know how many fourth-rank invincibles there were in Tianfeng Sea, but now looking at this situation, I am afraid that it is far beyond tens of thousands, otherwise it would be impossible for so many invincible people to take over an almost death-defying mission.

Soon, a first-class invincible descended here.

"This is the Heavenly Wind Sea Qingyang Supreme!"

A third-class invincible introduced.

"I've seen the Qingyang Supreme!"

Many invincible people said respectfully.

The highest member of the Heavenly Wind Sea is the Supreme Member, and the Supreme Member is only below the few leaders of the Heavenly Wind Sea, and is also called the Supreme.

For example, if Ye Tian is promoted to a supreme-level member, he will also be called the supreme of ten thousand laws.

And in Tianfeng Sea, if you want to become a supreme-level member, you must at least be a first-class invincible.

Qingyang Supreme looked at the many invincible people and said: "You have all taken this task, there is one thing that must be said in advance, that is, about the content of the mission, no one is allowed to reveal it, if anyone dares to disobey, it is tantamount to betraying Tianfeng Hai." In addition, every invincible must make an oath under the Eternal Source Oath Stone, and once the oath is made, even if it is a clone, the oath will spread to the main body, so if you dare to divulge the secrets, you will definitely fall. If you don't want to make an oath, leave now!"

As soon as he finished speaking, some of the invincibles left, apparently unwilling to make an oath, or having other scruples, or even regretting themselves, and now they had an excuse.

In the end, there were more than 8,000 invincible people who were willing to make an oath, including Ye Tian.

Subsequently, the Qingyang Supreme took out the Eternal Source Oath Stone.

The Eternal Source Oath Stone is just the most rubbish kind of Eternal Source Thing, and its value is not high, and it is not even as good as a regular Heavenly Object.

The grade of the eternal source is high, but if it is useless, the value is naturally not large, and the oath stone cannot improve its strength, nor can it give benefits, it can only make people make an oath, even if its grade is high, the value is not high.

But if you make an oath on the Oath Stone, even if you are far away from the Tianlin Realm, you will be bound by the Oath Stone.

After all, the effect of the Eternal Source Oath Stone covers the entire Source Sea, and no matter where you flee, you can't avoid the effect of the Oath Stone.

In a short time, everyone made a vow.

"Qingyang Supreme, we have all made an oath, what is this mission?"

An invincible man asked.

Qingyang Supreme said: "Your task is to escort one thing, I am going to divide you into squads, each squad has ten invincibles, I will give you a route, after arriving at the destination, the task will be completed!"

"It's so simple, could it be that there will be a strong ambush on the road?" an invincible person realized it and asked on the spot.

"Yes, there will indeed be someone ambushed!" Qingyang Supreme nodded.

At this time, Ye Tian asked, "Qingyang Supreme, since someone will ambush, why only send fourth-rank invincibles to carry out this mission, and not let third-rank invincibles or above, or even first-class invincibles, carry out the mission?"

The other invincible ones also looked at the Qingyang Supreme, and they were also very curious.

Qingyang Supreme smiled and said, "That's a good question, but it's even more dangerous to send an invincible person above the third rank." The biggest difference between a fourth-class invincible person and a third-class invincible person is the breath, the third-class invincible person can absorb the source power of the source sea, in fact, it is already regarded as the source sea life, and the breath of the fourth-class invincible person is very different, in the eyes of the strong, it is difficult for the third-class invincible person to hide himself, even if he is hiding in a foreign world, it is like a flame hidden in the dark. On the other hand, it is a fourth-class invincible, if it hides in a foreign world, it is difficult to find even a first-class invincible. In addition, the strength of the local invincibles in the Tianlin Realm will be suppressed very much when they enter the exotic void, especially the invincible above the third rank, if they enter the exotic world, their strength will not only be suppressed greatly, but they will not be able to stay for a long time, as for the invincible people above the second rank, whether they are the creatures of the exotic world or the creatures of the eternal world, they can no longer enter the exotic world, this is the restriction of the rules of the source sea, only the supreme can break it, but the supreme cannot stay in the exotic world for a long time. Besides, the Supreme One will not be involved in this mission, so you can rest assured. "

Ye Tian understood when he heard this, the invincible people of the second rank and above could not enter the foreign world.

In this way, he will become a second-class invincible in the future, and it is estimated that he will not be able to stay in the dark forbidden realm any longer.

Judging from this rule, it is indeed the safest way to send fourth-class invincible people to rush from one foreign land to another, if you rush from the source sea, it is not possible to send the weak, at least send a first-class invincible, and the enemy's strength is afraid to be very strong, and Tianfeng Hai does not dare to send first-class invincibles, otherwise if you lose too many first-class invincibles, Tianfeng Hai may fall from the ranking of saint-level forces.

Abrupt.

An invincible person said curiously: "Qingyang Supreme, doesn't it mean that if three invincibles are born in an exotic world, this exotic world will be promoted to an eternal heaven and earth? If you become a second-class invincible, you can't cultivate in the exotic world, so how can the exotic world be promoted?"

Qingyang Supreme said: "Although this question has nothing to do with the task, let me tell you, even if you leave your own exotic world, you will still leave a mark on your exotic world, as long as your exotic world is not completely annihilated, this exotic world has given birth to a total of three supreme beings, and the source sea will be infused with endless source power, promoting the evolution of the exotic world into an eternal world." If a foreign world really gave birth to a supreme being, this supreme being would try his best to extend the life of an exotic heaven and earth, from 100,000 eons to hundreds of thousands or even millions of eons. At the beginning, it was with the help of the Supreme One that the Tianlin Realm extended its lifespan to 5 million Tribulation Elements, and finally gave birth to three Supreme Beings and became the Eternal Heaven and Earth. "

Then no one asked about anything unrelated to the mission.

And from beginning to end, no one asked what the task items were, and since Qingyang Supreme didn't say it, it must be that the secrets involved were too important to say.

In the end, Ye Tian and the others were divided one by one, and they were given a route and the end destination of the mission.

Everyone has a box in their hands, but in fact only one of these boxes is real and the others are fake.

That is, only one squad has the real item, and the other squads are all decoys.
